MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Wasserman David, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff and Amanda Ebey, Esq. appeared for Defendant Michael Edgars. The parties settled per written stipulation not placed on the record. Trial date is vacated.
